content.full_text:
Mr. William McCann, Manager  
Sixth District Agricultural Association  
California Museum of Science and Industry  
700 State Drive  
Los Angeles, CA 90036

Dear Mr. McCann:

This is in response to your telephone inquiry of September 8, 1976.

The Sixth District Agricultural Association/California Museum of Science and Industry will be noticed for submission of a Conflict of Interest Code to the Fair Political Practices Commission on February 10, 1977.

The California Museum of Science and Industry was previously noticed for a deadline of October 10, 1976. This notice and deadline date is separate from that established for the Department of Food and Agriculture. Thus, a separate Code is required to be submitted.

After resolution of current issues concerning interpretation of the Commission's Regulations, development of new policy statements, disclosure forms for designated employees and revised guidelines for the development of Conflict of Interest Codes, deadline dates were re-established to allow agencies adequate time to develop their Codes. These new materials will be transmitted to you later this week.

Mr. Bair, Chief, Fairs and Exposition Division, Department of Food and Agriculture, informed this office in a telephone conversation that the Agricultural Association Districts' Codes will be drafted by the Fairs and Exposition Division. His office will be communicating with those Districts regarding the preparation of a proposed Conflict of Interest Code and will insure that affected employees in the Districts will have adequate notice of a hearing and a fair opportunity to present their views on such a Code. Perhaps, a copy of their proposed Code would be helpful to you.

The Conflict of Interest Code of the Fairs and Exposition Division shall be made a part of the Code for the Department of Food and Agriculture. The deadline date for submission of a Conflict of Interest Code from the Department of Food and Agriculture to the Fair Political Practices Commission is December 10, 1976.

I hope this information will be of some assistance to you. If you have further questions or require additional information, please do not hesitate to contact this office.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Delbert L. Spurlock Jr., Chief
Conflicts of Interest Division

mra

cc: Mr. Herbert L. Cohen
    Mr. Thomas E. Bair
    Department of Food and Agriculture
